ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reservoirs" (
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservoir */,
  "reservoir_name" TEXT /* Name of the reservoir */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the reservoir */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the reservoir is located */,
  "reservoir_type" TEXT /* Type of reservoir */,
  "construction_year" INTEGER /* Year the reservoir was constructed */,
  "capacity_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the reservoir's capacity */,
  "drainage_area" REAL /* Area of the watershed that drains into the reservoir */,
  "max_depth" REAL /* Maximum depth of the reservoir */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Surface area of the reservoir */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capacity_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capacity record */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservoir being recorded */,
  "storage" INTEGER /* Current water storage in the reservoir */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the reservoir */,
  "pct_capacity" REAL /* Percentage of capacity currently filled */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded status */,
  "inflow" REAL /* Amount of water flowing into the reservoir during the recorded period */,
  "outflow" REAL /* Amount of water flowing out of the reservoir during the recorded period */,
  "evaporation" REAL /* Amount of water lost to evaporation during the recorded period */,
  "seepage" REAL /* Amount of water lost to seepage during the recorded period */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality of the reservoir during the recorded period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_capacity_records_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservoir */,
  "average_storage" INTEGER /* Average storage over a specified period */,
  "average_capacity" INTEGER /* Average capacity over a specified period */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range for the historical data */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservoir_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "reservoir_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reservoir */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in the area around the reservoir */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation levels recorded */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date when conditions were recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in the area around the reservoir */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level in the area around the reservoir */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water in the reservoir */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservoir_conditions_reservoir_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservoir_id") REFERENCES reservoirs ("reservoir_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user who accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
